BW
Brooke Welsh, WHNP Online
Typically responds in under 4 hours · Care team also includes Nicki Tran, NP
View full thread →
Your Feb 19 labs look excellent — testosterone at 853 ng/dL, well into the optimized band. Free T jumped 213% from baseline. Pellet absorption is right on target.
Brooke · 2 days ago
I'd like to keep the current protocol through your April 15 follow-up. If energy/sleep stay where they are, we'll discuss extending the pellet interval to 4 months at that visit.
Brooke · 2 days ago
Sounds good. Energy is the highest it's been in years — hitting the gym 5x/week again. Will note in the weekly check-ins.
You · yesterday
Love that. Keep an eye on hematocrit at the next draw — common with optimized T. Already added it to your panel for May.
Brooke · 4 hours ago · new
